title: Verbose Subtitles Resource Pack
description: A simple 26.1.2 resource pack that creates unique subtitles for every sound event in Minecraft.
body:
# Verbose Subtitles Resource Pack ![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft%20Version-26.1.2-blue?style=flat-square) [![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/FlamedDogo99/VerboseSubtitles?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/FlamedDogo99/VerboseSubtitles/blob/main/LICENSE) ## About A simple 26.1.2 resource pack that creates unique subtitles for every sound event in Minecraft. The goal of this resource pack is to make Minecraft more accessible for anyone with auditory impairments, however it is also just generally helpful for finding hidden mobs, resources, etc. This pack only consists of a `en_us.json` lang file, and a `sounds.json` file, so in theory it's compatible all the way down to 1.10. So far, it's only been tested in 1.21 - 26.1.2 For older versions, see the [github repository](https://github.com/FlamedDogo99/VerboseSubtitles)
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c99f892d9d3d9b51101efd017936d46a554623ee.png)
## Known Issues The resource pack uses the `sounds.json` file to add / redefine subtitles in-game. It should not conflict with other custom / replaced sounds, but has a high chance of breaking other resource packs that use a custom sounds.json file.
